msg: feat: added da cutest starting menu ever!! big title, start button, patch notes, and uwu vibes~ press START to enter da void!
fix: added visible placeholder UI and bg color so da void is cute not scary! now u see a message, not just black~ UwU
fix: minimal src/ and index.html added so da void loads! site no longer 404s, just empty and ready for new life~ UwU
fix: patchnotes in dist/ finally match public/ meow~ no more ghost entries haunting da build!! UwU 🐾✨
fix: patchnotes now only show da final nuke. all history erased. meow.
chore: deleted da whole game. blank as my soul. nothing left but dreams and package.json. meow.
chore: fix patchnotes script to use v1.0.0 tag boundary. da old entries r gone now. clean slate enforced. mrrrow.
v1.0.0 feat: new game, who dis. scraped everything. npcs gone. mobs gone. cat god gone. rebuilt as The Incremental Game. clean world. clean slate. this is fine. mrrrow.
